Name: Remove Server from Azure Load Balancer
Description: Uses Service Principal to Remove Server From Azure Load Balancer.

Parameters.Name: rsflbAzureAccount
Parameters.Label: Azure Account
Parameters.HelpText: Service Principal used to connect to Azure

Parameters.Name: rsflbAzureSubscription
Parameters.Label: Azure Subscription
Parameters.HelpText: Subscription Load Balancer belongs to. Eg. 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000

Parameters.Name: rsflbAzureResourceGroup
Parameters.Label: Azure Resource Group
Parameters.HelpText: Resource Group Load Balancer belongs to. Eg. ProductionAus

Parameters.Name: rsflbAzureMachineName
Parameters.Label: Azure Machine Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of Virtual Machine to remove from Load Balancer. Eg Web01
